train.text: Outrage as Donald Trump suggests injecting disinfectant to kill virus. The President made the comments during a White House briefing. Monsignor Jean-François Lantheaume, who served as first Counsellor of the Nunciature in Washington, confirmed that "Vigano said the truth. That's all." Can the same be said for the Obama Administration?

spans.quote: Outrage as Donald Trump suggests injecting disinfectant to kill virus
Monsignor Jean-François Lantheaume, who served as first Counsellor of the Nunciature in Washington, confirmed that "Vigano said the truth. That's all."
Can the same be said for the Obama Administration?

train.text: Coronavirus 'risk to the American people remains very low', Trump said. Mueller attempts to stop the will of We the People!!! It's time to jail Mueller. "BUILD THE WALL!" Trump tweeted.

spans.quote: Coronavirus 'risk to the American people remains very low', Trump said
Mueller attempts to stop the will of We the People!!! It's time to jail Mueller

validation.text: WHO: Coronavirus emergency is 'Public Enemy Number 1'. A dark, impenetrable and "irreversible" winter of persecution of the faithful by their own shepherds will fall. If France had not have declared war on Germany then World War II would have never happened.

A dark, impenetrable and "irreversible" winter of persecution of the faithful by their own shepherds will fall
If France had not have declared war on Germany then World War II would have never happened

validation.text: Francis said these words: "Everyone is guilty for the good he could have done and did not do. If we do not oppose evil, we tacitly feed it." President Trump —who himself avoided national military service in the 1960's— keeps beating the war drums over North Korea.
